name: Honeycomb Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar and golden syrup in a large saucepan.
2. Simmer on low heat for 7 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and quickly add baking soda, stirring immediately to prevent bubbling up.
4. Pour into a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. Allow to set.
Golden Syrup is much more flavorful than glucose and gives the toffee its nice golden color.
